=== Properties ===
Minimal Height Limit: 7   

Minimal Height: 22   

Maximum Height: 40   

Maximum Height Limit: 50   

Minimal Radius: 256   

Maximum Radius: 320   

Roughness: 1   

Hills: 5   

Chance: 2   

Music: Sunrise   

Valid Player Spawn: True   

=== Structures ===
====Boulder====
Chance: 0.00016   

Block: Slate   

Size: 5   

Size Variance: 1   

ID: Boulder   

====Fallen Tree====
Chance: 0.0024   

Log: Oak Log   

Top: Oak Log   

Height: 6   

Height Variation: 3   

ID: Fallen Tree   

====Flower Patch====
Chance: 0.001   

Block: Daisies   

Width: 10   

Variation: 6   

Density: 0.3   

Priority: 0.1   

ID: Flower Patch   

====Flower Patch====
Chance: 0.0008   

Block: Dandelions   

Width: 6   

Variation: 4   

Density: 0.3   

Priority: 0.1   

ID: Flower Patch   

====Tree/Oak/White====
Chance: 0.03   

Structure: Tree/Oak/White   

Place Mode: Degradable   

ID: Sbb   


[[Category:Land_Biomes]]
